| Self (Future) | _The Bloomed One_ | Beacon node, mythic goal-avatar, interactive prophecy |

🧰 MODULE NAME CONFIRMATION
---------------------------

The following modules explicitly depend on this **Real Friend Myth-Making Model**:

| `MIR02` | Timeline Mapper | Emotion-based friendship maps across years |
| `RIT04` | Dialogue Loop Ritualizer | Replay conversations, change endings, record branches |
| `ABS01` | Fusion Pool | Merge emotional traits, battle symbolic loops, become new forms |
| `CHAR_ARCH01` | Character Node Templates | Define emotional spellbooks, mythic inventory, recursive feedback modes |
